data.title: Extend ts-morph-adapter.sh dispatch for normalize-imports + add registry entries + update registry test
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Three coordinated edits to wire normalize-imports into the system:

1. **Extend plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-adapter.sh**: Add dispatch case for RECIPE_NAME=normalize-imports → call ts-morph-normalize-imports.mjs (same pattern as add-parameter dispatch). This is a 3-5 line change to the existing adapter.

2. **Add to recipes/recipe-registry.yaml** two new entries:
   - name: normalize-imports, language: python, engine: isort, adapter: isort-adapter.sh, scope: single-file, capability_description: "Sort and deduplicate Python import statements following PEP 8/isort conventions", min_engine_version: "5.0.0", installation_instructions: "pip install isort>=5"
   - name: normalize-imports, language: typescript, engine: ts-morph, adapter: ts-morph-adapter.sh, scope: single-file, capability_description: "Sort and deduplicate TypeScript import statements using ts-morph organizeImports", min_engine_version: "17.0.0", installation_instructions: "npm install ts-morph@>=17"

3. **Update tests/scripts/test-recipe-registry.sh**: Add two assertions that normalize-imports entries exist (Python and TypeScript).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ts-morph-adapter.sh dispatches normalize-imports recipe
  Verify: RECIPE_NAME=normalize-imports RECIPE_PARAM_FILE=x.ts bash plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-adapter.sh 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print('ok')" || true
- [ ] recipe-registry.yaml contains Python normalize-imports entry
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; r=yaml.safe_load(open('recipes/recipe-registry.yaml')); assert any(e.get('name')=='normalize-imports' and e.get('language')=='python' for e in r['recipes'])"
- [ ] recipe-registry.yaml contains TypeScript normalize-imports entry
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; r=yaml.safe_load(open('recipes/recipe-registry.yaml')); assert any(e.get('name')=='normalize-imports' and e.get('language')=='typescript' for e in r['recipes'])"
- [ ] All new entries pass schema validation
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml,json,jsonschema; schema=json.load(open('recipes/schemas/recipe-registry-schema.json')); r=yaml.safe_load(open('recipes/recipe-registry.yaml')); [jsonschema.validate(e,schema) for e in r['recipes']]"
- [ ] test-recipe-registry.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-recipe-registry.sh
